description: A volleyball game taking place at a beach of a retro / neon city. Single player game where you play as a part of team of 4 vs another team of 4. Game has selection for a quick game of 14 points or longer of 21. Follows standard rules of volleyball, 3 hits max per team, same person can’t hit twice in a row.

improvements.request: Improve gameplay clarity, make the app clearly winnable/playable, improve feedback, and preserve existing working behavior.

1. You should be able to also select the difficulty, higher difficulty means opponents loses less points.
2. There should be actual little voleyvall characters models.
3. You should be able to select different maps. 
4. You should be able to jump and then 2 separate buttons to receive the ball and another to spike the ball
It keeps bugging out that sometimes after the first hit by either team the game ends
It’s counting single hits as double hits
